problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway — specifically CRISPR gene editing — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
